overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long NBIS Daily ETF (NBIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) stock, less fees, and expenses NBIG was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
